text: The office thermostat is set to 68 degrees during work hours.
The team stand-up happens every weekday at 9:30 AM.
The design system uses Radix UI primitives with Tailwind styling.
Release notes are written in present tense and grouped by feature area.
The onboarding doc lives in the internal wiki under Engineering.
Code review requires at least one approval before merging.
The support inbox is triaged twice a day by the on-call engineer.
New hires get a laptop provisioned within their first week.
The staging server runs Node.js 18 LTS.
The staging server was upgraded and now runs Node.js 22 LTS.
The primary deployment region is us-east-1.
The primary deployment region was moved to eu-central-1 for latency reasons.
The API gateway rate limit is 100 requests per minute.
The API gateway rate limit was raised to 500 requests per minute.
The on-call rotation is one week long.
The on-call rotation was shortened to three days.
